## Scope


## Script and command


## Authorization

- [ ] Target is owned or explicitly approved for testing
- [ ] Activity is within the written assessment scope
- [ ] `--dry-run` or `-WhatIf` output was reviewed first

## Data handling

- [ ] No credentials are committed
- [ ] No real scan output, packet captures, or customer data are committed
- [ ] Outputs are stored in an approved location
